title: Nutty Light Middle Eastern Mushrooms Stir-fry
description: A light and nutty post-workout dish featuring wild mushrooms in a Mediterranean-inspired medley of herbs and spices for an easy, healthy meal.

ingredients.name: Wild Mushrooms
ingredients.notes: Choose a variety of wild mushrooms for added texture and flavor.

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: For cooking and drizzling on top

instructions: Clean and trim the mushrooms. Slice them into half-moons.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add onions and garlic; sauté until softened.
Add wild mushrooms to the skillet with a sprinkle of salt and pepper. Cook until they release their moisture and start to brown.
Stir in thyme leaves, oregano seeds, paprika powder, almonds, and continue cooking for another 2 minutes or until the nuts begin to toast lightly.
Serve hot as a side dish or over quinoa or rice for added protein.
